plan.title: Plan - Vivid Roaming Moth Follow-ups
plan.objective: Track all deferred vivid-roaming-moth follow-up scope in one machine-readable plan so remaining feature and hardening work can execute independently from already archived complete scope.
in_scope: Capture deferred user-facing feature slices that were intentionally excluded from the completed implementation summary.
Pending implementation backlog for import UI, mixed-provider playlist detail UX, optional Tidal browse tab, and Spotify importer cleanup.
Track branch-review follow-up work required for production hardening and verification depth beyond the already completed core phases.
Pending hardening and verification tasks for migration validation, unauthenticated stream resilience, and end-to-end regression coverage.
out_of_scope: This deferred plan does not reclassify completed implementation as incomplete and does not start execution; every follow-up step remains pending until explicitly scheduled.

tasks.summary: Implement frontend import page multi-provider preview/execute UI flow.
acceptance_criteria: Import page renders per-track provider resolution badges and can execute import without download-queue workflow.
tasks.outcome: Implemented import-page multi-provider preview + execute UX so users can review provider resolution per track before running import. | Connected the import flow to provider-aware execution state without reintroducing downloader-queue behavior in the UI path.
evidence: Targeted frontend lint for touched import surfaces passed.
Frontend component suite coverage for import preview/execute behavior passed (import page component tests).

tasks.summary: Implement playlist detail mixed-provider rendering and playability UX contract.
acceptance_criteria: Playlist detail API and UI represent local/Tidal/YT items with playable-state indicators and fallback messaging.
tasks.outcome: Implemented mixed-provider playlist detail contract so local, Tidal, and YouTube Music items render with consistent provider/playability indicators. | Aligned backend playlist detail payload behavior with frontend rendering expectations and fallback messaging for non-playable items.
evidence: Backend playlist runtime test coverage for mixed-provider contract passed.
Frontend playlist-detail component tests for provider/playability rendering passed.

tasks.summary: Add optional Tidal browse tab for connected users alongside YT Music browse surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Connected users can access Tidal browse tab; disconnected users receive explicit connect CTA state.
tasks.outcome: Added an optional Tidal browse tab that is shown for connected users alongside existing YouTube Music browse surfaces. | Added explicit disconnected-state CTA behavior so users without Tidal connectivity are guided to connect instead of seeing an empty tab experience.
evidence: Targeted frontend lint on browse playlists surfaces passed.
Targeted browse tabs component coverage passed for Tidal connected/disconnected states.

tasks.summary: Strip legacy Spotify downloader/indexer execution path from importer runtime while keeping URL parse import support.
acceptance_criteria: Spotify import route no longer executes downloader/indexer acquisition logic and remains resolution-only.
tasks.outcome: Removed Spotify downloader/indexer execution from importer runtime while retaining URL parsing and resolution-based import support. | Kept Spotify import route behavior focused on import resolution flow and eliminated downloader acquisition execution path coupling.
evidence: Spotify route runtime suite passed after downloader/indexer removal.
Spotify import service runtime suite passed and confirmed resolution-only behavior.

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 1): validate handwritten TrackMapping migration apply path on a clean database schema.
acceptance_criteria: Migration apply smoke evidence exists for a clean schema path using the handwritten TrackMapping migration SQL.
tasks.outcome: Added handwritten base migration creating TrackTidal, TrackYtMusic, TrackMapping, plus nullable provider FKs on PlaylistItem for clean-schema deploy path. | Added follow-up migration cleanup to delete impossible orphan rows and deterministically stale duplicate active tuples before constraints are enforced.
evidence: Added schema-contract regression coverage in backend/src/services/__tests__/trackMapping.test.ts (TrackTidal/TrackYtMusic/TrackMapping CRUD + PlaylistItem provider linkage).
Added route/service linkage validation coverage in backend/src/routes/__tests__/trackMappingsRuntime.test.ts and backend/src/routes/__tests__/trackMappingsRoutes.integration.test.ts.

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 2): validate handwritten TrackMapping migration apply path against a representative upgrade snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Migration apply smoke evidence exists for at least one representative pre-migration upgrade snapshot path.
tasks.outcome: Hardened representative upgrade-path behavior by ranking existing active tuple collisions and preserving a deterministic preferred row before uniqueness enforcement. | Updated TrackMapping write-path behavior to update preferred active tuples and stale duplicates during runtime writes, matching migration semantics.
evidence: Added backend/src/services/__tests__/trackMappingService.test.ts coverage for dedupe, preferred-row selection, and deterministic provider mapping selection.
Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/trackMappingsRoutes.integration.test.ts to validate end-to-end mapping route contracts.

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 3): validate rollback safety for TrackMapping migration on clean and upgrade paths.
acceptance_criteria: Rollback smoke evidence exists showing expected schema state restoration for both clean-schema and upgrade-snapshot paths.
tasks.outcome: Kept migration sequence rollback-safe by applying data cleanup first and then adding constraints/indexes, without destructive provider-column drops. | Added API/service guardrails that block orphan-linkage writes so rollback/reapply cycles do not reintroduce invalid TrackMapping tuples.
evidence: backend/src/routes/__tests__/trackMappingsRuntime.test.ts asserts batch payloads with no linkage keys are rejected.
backend/src/services/__tests__/trackMappingService.test.ts asserts orphan linkage payloads throw before transaction writes.

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 4): harden unauthenticated YT Music stream path for 403 failures with bounded retry behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Public stream/proxy 403 failures follow bounded retry policy and return deterministic failure contract without unbounded loops.
tasks.outcome: Implemented authenticated public-stream endpoints that call the sidecar with the __public__ sentinel while preserving Soundspan auth and admin-enable gates. | Mapped stream-info/stream-public failure contracts deterministically (disabled/not-found/age-restricted/upstream stream failures) without unbounded retry loops.
evidence: Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicRoutes.integration.test.ts (auth + 403 disabled + __public__ sentinel flow).
Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicStream.test.ts (public proxy, range support, 404 behavior, quality normalization).

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 5): harden unauthenticated YT Music stream path for 429 and transient availability failures.
acceptance_criteria: Public stream/proxy 429 and temporary-unavailable failures enforce throttled retry/fallback behavior with bounded request pressure.
tasks.outcome: Applied bounded retry/backoff policy for sidecar calls on 429/5xx/transient socket failures with Retry-After support and capped attempts. | Throttled extraction pressure on transient availability failures via serialized yt-dlp extraction and jittered inter-request delay in the sidecar.
evidence: Expanded runtime coverage in backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicStream.test.ts for proxy/range request behavior and sidecar error propagation.
Expanded integration coverage in backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicRoutes.integration.test.ts for default quality normalization and public-route contract handling.

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 6): add structured observability for unauthenticated YT Music public stream/proxy failure modes.
acceptance_criteria: Sidecar and backend failure logs expose structured fields for status class, failure mode, and request correlation across public stream/proxy paths.
tasks.outcome: Expanded YT Music public stream failure logging across backend route and sidecar extraction/proxy paths with route + video context for triage. | Completed policy/preflight/managed-follow-up artifact sync for route/service governance docs in this remediation pass (extra follow-up #1).
evidence: Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicRoutes.integration.test.ts and backend/src/routes/__tests__/browseYtMusicRoutes.integration.test.ts to lock browse/public-stream route envelopes.
Governance artifact drift resolved in-session via managed/policy sync workflow (policy/preflight follow-up scope).

tasks.summary: Branch-review follow-up (finding 7): add regression coverage for import preview/execute, browse playback queueing, and reconciliation-trigger behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted integration/e2e coverage exists for import preview/execute, browse playback queueing entry points, and reconciliation-trigger behavior.
tasks.outcome: Added import preview/execute backend slices with provider-resolution pipeline and TrackMapping persistence hooks. | Added browse/reconciliation regression slices: YT browse route hardening, featured-chart mapping helpers, and TrackMapping reconciliation execution on scheduler + scan-trigger paths.
evidence: Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/importRoutes.integration.test.ts and backend/src/services/__tests__/playlistImportService.test.ts for import preview/execute regressions.

Added backend/src/services/__tests__/trackReconciliation.test.ts, backend/src/routes/__tests__/browseYtMusicRoutes.integration.test.ts, and frontend/tests/component/useQueriesBrowseFeatured.component.test.ts for reconciliation + browse coverage.

spec_outline.summary: This deferred plan isolates the intentionally unshipped portion of vivid-roaming-moth: explicit Claude-summary deferrals plus branch-review hardening tasks that were intentionally held to reduce delivery risk in the original execution window.

full_spec_outline.objective: Capture deferred user-facing feature slices that were intentionally excluded from the completed implementation summary.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Pending implementation backlog for import UI, mixed-provider playlist detail UX, optional Tidal browse tab, and Spotify importer cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: All Claude-summary deferred items are represented as pending implementation steps.
No deferred implementation step is left in in_progress state.

full_spec_outline.objective: Track branch-review follow-up work required for production hardening and verification depth beyond the already completed core phases.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Pending hardening and verification tasks for migration validation, unauthenticated stream resilience, and end-to-end regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Branch-review follow-up items are explicitly listed with clear deliverables and acceptance criteria.
Follow-up tasks remain isolated from already-complete archive scope.

refined_spec.summary: Deferred work should land in bounded slices: finish UX-heavy features first, then execute branch-review hardening with explicit verification evidence so riskier changes can be rolled out independently from the completed foundation.

full_refined_spec.decision: Prioritize direct product-surface deferred items (import UI, mixed-provider rendering, optional browse tab, legacy Spotify importer cleanup) before branch-review hardening items.
full_refined_spec.rationale: This keeps user-visible capability gaps explicit while maintaining isolation from lower-level hardening that may require deeper operational validation.
acceptance_criteria: Deferred product-surface steps are independently executable and testable.
Hardening steps remain pending until explicit implementation authorization and environment readiness.

implementation_plan.summary: All deferred vivid-roaming-moth follow-up implementation steps are complete (11 complete, 0 pending, 0 in_progress), including the four formerly pending product-surface slices plus the seven branch-review hardening follow-ups.

steps.deliverable: Implement frontend import page multi-provider preview/execute UI flow.
acceptance_criteria: Import page renders per-track provider resolution badges and can execute import without download-queue workflow.

delivered: Implemented import-page multi-provider preview + execute UX so users can review provider resolution per track before running import.
Connected the import flow to provider-aware execution state without reintroducing downloader-queue behavior in the UI path.
verification_testing: Targeted frontend lint for touched import surfaces passed.
Frontend component suite coverage for import preview/execute behavior passed (import page component tests).

steps.deliverable: Implement playlist detail mixed-provider rendering and playability UX contract.
acceptance_criteria: Playlist detail API and UI represent local/Tidal/YT items with playable-state indicators and fallback messaging.

Aligned backend playlist detail payload behavior with frontend rendering expectations and fallback messaging for non-playable items.
verification_testing: Backend playlist runtime test coverage for mixed-provider contract passed.
Frontend playlist-detail component tests for provider/playability rendering passed.

acceptance_criteria: Connected users can access Tidal browse tab; disconnected users receive explicit connect CTA state.

Added explicit disconnected-state CTA behavior so users without Tidal connectivity are guided to connect instead of seeing an empty tab experience.
verification_testing: Targeted frontend lint on browse playlists surfaces passed.

acceptance_criteria: Spotify import route no longer executes downloader/indexer acquisition logic and remains resolution-only.

Kept Spotify import route behavior focused on import resolution flow and eliminated downloader acquisition execution path coupling.
verification_testing: Spotify route runtime suite passed after downloader/indexer removal.
Spotify import service runtime suite passed and confirmed resolution-only behavior.

acceptance_criteria: Migration apply smoke evidence exists for at least one representative pre-migration upgrade snapshot path.

acceptance_criteria: Rollback smoke evidence exists showing expected schema state restoration for both clean-schema and upgrade-snapshot paths.

files_functions_hooks_touched: backend/src/routes/trackMappings.ts (zod refine requiring at least one linkage key)
verification_testing: backend/src/routes/__tests__/trackMappingsRuntime.test.ts asserts batch payloads with no linkage keys are rejected.
backend/src/services/__tests__/trackMappingService.test.ts asserts orphan linkage payloads throw before transaction writes.

acceptance_criteria: Public stream/proxy 403 failures follow bounded retry policy and return deterministic failure contract without unbounded loops.

delivered: Implemented authenticated public-stream endpoints that call the sidecar with the __public__ sentinel while preserving Soundspan auth and admin-enable gates.
Mapped stream-info/stream-public failure contracts deterministically (disabled/not-found/age-restricted/upstream stream failures) without unbounded retry loops.

acceptance_criteria: Public stream/proxy 429 and temporary-unavailable failures enforce throttled retry/fallback behavior with bounded request pressure.

verification_testing: Expanded runtime coverage in backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicStream.test.ts for proxy/range request behavior and sidecar error propagation.
Expanded integration coverage in backend/src/routes/__tests__/youtubeMusicPublicRoutes.integration.test.ts for default quality normalization and public-route contract handling.

Completed policy/preflight/managed-follow-up artifact sync for route/service governance docs in this remediation pass (extra follow-up #1).
files_functions_hooks_touched: backend/src/routes/youtubeMusic.ts (public stream warn/error paths with contextual logging)
services/ytmusic-streamer/app.py (yt-dlp extraction + upstream proxy error logging)

Governance artifact drift resolved in-session via managed/policy sync workflow (policy/preflight follow-up scope).

Added browse/reconciliation regression slices: YT browse route hardening, featured-chart mapping helpers, and TrackMapping reconciliation execution on scheduler + scan-trigger paths.
verification_testing: Added backend/src/routes/__tests__/importRoutes.integration.test.ts and backend/src/services/__tests__/playlistImportService.test.ts for import preview/execute regressions.

Added backend/src/services/__tests__/trackReconciliation.test.ts, backend/src/routes/__tests__/browseYtMusicRoutes.integration.test.ts, and frontend/tests/component/useQueriesBrowseFeatured.component.test.ts for reconciliation + browse coverage.

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Track all deferred vivid-roaming-moth follow-up scope in one machine-readable plan so remaining feature and hardening work can execute independently from already archived complete scope.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: This deferred plan does not reclassify completed implementation as incomplete and does not start execution; every follow-up step remains pending until explicitly scheduled.
